title: kmod bug fix and enhancement update
overview: An update for Oracle Linux is now available for Oracle Linux 9.
description:
[28-11.0.1]
- Add improvement to modprobe to handle UEK8 packaging better [Orabug: 37689559] (Harshit Mogalapalli)
- weak-modules: Fix add_kernel to handle suffix [Orabug: 34623248] (Todd Vierling)
- add weak-modules patch for [Orabug: 26672773]

[28-11]
- check weak-updates directory exists before using it
- Resolves: RHEL-106279
full_text:
[28-11.0.1]
- Add improvement to modprobe to handle UEK8 packaging better [Orabug: 37689559] (Harshit Mogalapalli)
- weak-modules: Fix add_kernel to handle suffix [Orabug: 34623248] (Todd Vierling)
- add weak-modules patch for [Orabug: 26672773]

[28-11]
- check weak-updates directory exists before using it
- Resolves: RHEL-106279

References:
https://linux.oracle.com/errata/ELBA-2025-20621-0.html
